   "reasoning": "I'm frustrated with the current state of our education system, where underprepared peers are slowing down the curriculum and burnt-out teachers are teaching to the slowest student in the room. I believe that investing in teacher incentives and resource reallocation will raise the ceiling for students like me who are eager to learn. Transparency reports will also hold schools accountable for their performance, which is long overdue. I'm skeptical of broad scholarships and counseling programs, as they might not address the root issues.",
